chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Crl. Appeal No.S-182 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, Assistant Prosecutor General Sindh. Mr. Kanji Mal Meghwar, advocate a/w complainant. = None present for the appellants. Counsel for complainant states that appellants have filed this appeal against conviction and sentencing for one month SI with fine of Rs.10,000/- and in case of default, payment of fine, the appellants shall further undergo 15 days SI, which is already lapsed and the appellants have been released, as such this appeal has become infructuous. In view of above, instant criminal appeal is dismissed being infructuous. JUDGE *Faisal*
